content:
Sashiko (AI review) is now available for the rust-for-linux mailing list:

https://sashiko.dev/#/?list=org.kernel.vger.rust-for-linux

It currently doesn't have custom Rust prompts, so it is likely we can improve the reviews.

For instance, @Gary Guo is working on some prompts, I plan to link to e.g. our guidelines rules, we could also do things like add skills like a Coccinelle for Rust one to pair it with the recently added Coccinelle one (i.e. for C), and so on (Cc @Tathagata Roy).

Thanks to @John Hubbard for asking Roman about it, @Gary Guo who has been looking at the existing reviews already for some days and, most importantly, to Roman Gushchin and Elkin Cruz for creating and maintaining Sashiko! :)
Is this going to automatically respond to people's patches on the mailing list? Or is it going to be opt-in?
It doesn't send emails right now. You have to view them in the browser instead.
